title: taraxacum hirtellum
intro: Taraxacum hirtellum, also known as rough dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, roots, and flowers, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant has been used to alleviate digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and support liver health, among other benefits. Taraxacum hirtellum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots can also be consumed raw or cooked as a vegetable.
